Package index

All functions

BRIERfull()
BRIER.FULL: integration of individual-level external data
BRIERfull.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.FULL fits
BRIERi()
BRIER.I: integration of pretrained external models with target individual-level data
BRIERi.cv()
Cross-validation for BRIER.I
BRIERi.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.I fits
BRIERs()
BRIER.S: integration of pretrained external models with GWAS summary statistics
BRIERs.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.S fits
LD_blocks()
LD Block Structured SNP grouping
LD_sigma()
Block-Structured LD Calculation
calLD()
Calculate LD matrix for BRIER.S
calcDev()
Element-wise deviance
calcNullDev()
Null deviance
cd_glm_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for GLM with sequential strong rule
cd_summary_fit()
Coordinate descent for BRIERs estimation procedure
cd_wgaussian_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for weighted Gaussian regression with sequential strong rule
cd_wglm_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for weighted GLM with sequential strong rule
coef(<BRIER>)
Coefficients from a BRIER object
coef(<BRIER.fit>)
Coefficients from a single BRIER fit
g_link()
Forward link function
ginv_link()
Inverse link function
maxlambda_summary()
Maximum Lambda Selection for Summary Statistics
maxprod()
Maximum scaled inner product
p2cor()
Convert GWAS p-values to marginal correlations
predict(<BRIER>)
Predict from a BRIER object
predict(<BRIER.fit>)
Predict from a single BRIER fit
pseudo_validation()
Pseudo-validation score for summary-statistics models
standardize_X()
Standardize a design matrix
unstand_beta()
Unstandardize coefficients
wstandardize_X()
Weighted standardization of a design matrix
